Scoop (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,525,717Details
International Box Office $29,577,545
Worldwide Box Office $40,103,262
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,046,924 (28.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.45 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$4,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:538 opening theaters/541 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,219,481

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 28th, 2006 (Limited) by Focus/Rogue Pictures
International Releases: February 1st, 2007 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: November 21st, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual content
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Friendly Ghost, Haunting, Investigative Journalist, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Serial Killer, Stage Magician, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Jelly Roll Productions Ltd.
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
